---
name: Task creation
about: Create a task to help the project advance the roadmap
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

# Description
A clear and concise description of what the task is about.

# Definition of Done
A clear and concise description of what is needed for the task to be considered 'finished'. Creating sub-issues to help completing the task is recommended.

# Proposed Implementation
An explanation of how the task can be done. Suggest which files are affected.

## Additional context
Add any other context or screenshots about the task.
